summary: New Seamons matrix mix is praised and the recording is solid, though the first six minutes of Half Step are patched from another source.
review: Reviewers are enthusiastic about this newly released Seamons mtx blend, calling it a delight and giving it top marks. A technical note explains that the opening 6:27 of "Half Step" was missing from the original Oade AUD source and has been supplied from an external recording, normalized and EQ‑processed but not otherwise edited. No musical performance details are provided, so the show quality cannot be assessed.

ai_rating.rationale: High rating for recording quality based on positive comments about the new matrix mix; lack of performance information limits overall confidence.

recording_quality.technical_notes: New Seamons mtx blend praised; first 6:27 of Half Step missing from original AUD source and patched from Tommy McKeown's recording, normalized with Soundforge and pre‑emphasis applied via Waves EQ. No further editing performed.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details provided in the reviews.
